response_parsed.opinion: Stereotype threat in STEM refers to the anxiety individuals feel when they risk confirming negative stereotypes about their group. This can hinder performance and discourage participation. As someone who has seen many challenges in fitness training, I believe addressing this issue is crucial for creating an inclusive environment. We should promote diversity initiatives and provide support systems to help underrepresented groups thrive in STEM.
